category_sources: Official GitHub README says md2pdf generates a PDF from Markdown.
source_facts.description says this CLI generates PDF from Markdown.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use md2pdf/Markdown to PDF naming.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents features, installation, syntax highlighting, themes, TOC, and quick start.
Official repository includes md2pdf.1.md as the command manual source.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/solworktech/md2pdf; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists Markdown elements, PDF generation, syntax highlighting, themes, and Go install command.
